items.sourcePromptGloss: If an ambulance on an emergency mission is coming towards you in the same lane, what should you do?
items.reviewerReasoningSummary: Codex low-risk approveExistingQid: Prompt asks behaviour when encountering an ambulance in same lane coming opposite direction; q0138 matches and correct action corresponds to source option A (move to roadside/reduce speed/stop).
